name: Shopify
description: Import live Shopify store metrics into cells: =SHOPIFY_REVENUE, =SHOPIFY_ORDER_COUNT, =SHOPIFY_AVG_ORDER_VALUE, =SHOPIFY_PRODUCT_COUNT.
author: GridOS

secrets.label: Store domain
secrets.help: Your Shopify admin domain (no https://, no trailing slash).

secrets.label: Admin API token
secrets.help: Private app admin access token from Shopify Apps → Develop → Configure Admin API scopes. Needs read_orders and read_products.
